meaning: v.烤,烘,烘烤,暴露于某种热力下以得温暖
examples: The main course was roast duck.
They serve the most delicious roast beef.
Office workers and leisure lunchers devour Vietnamese roast pork banh mi sandwiches from Nomnom ( www.nomnomtruck.com).
Perhaps the best Peking duck restaurant in Beijing is Liqun Roast Duck Restarant.
